title: Jewellery Quarter Academy (Birmingham): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Jewellery Quarter Academy  URN: 141003  Notice issued to: CORE Education Trust  Reason for issue: requires significant improvement Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Jonathan Duff  DfE regional director office: West Midlands  Local authority: Birmingham City Council  "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
